hero.subheadline: Nurio Plex uses advanced chelated compound technology to support stable, efficient, and highly bioavailable mineral nutrition for livestock.

problem.subheadline: In livestock nutrition, the real problem is not only mineral intake. The actual loss occurs when minerals break down in the digestive system and cannot be effectively utilized by the body.
problem.card1Desc: Inorganic mineral sources degrade significantly as they pass through the acidic environment and digestive barriers. Absorption rates drop substantially, and real bioavailability is far lower than expected.
problem.card2Desc: Unabsorbed minerals represent both a financial loss and an environmental burden. Animal performance declines, yet the source of the problem is rarely traced back to mineral quality.
problem.card3Desc: True animal performance is not determined by how much mineral is consumed, but by how much is actually absorbed and efficiently utilized by the body.

technology.subheadline: Nurio Plex bonds mineral molecules with organic ligands to support stable transit through the digestive system and maximum absorption efficiency.
technology.step1Desc: The chelate structure helps protect minerals from degradation in the digestive environment, providing a more resilient mineral form against pH fluctuations and enzyme activity.
technology.step2Desc: Chelated minerals leverage their organic structure for improved intestinal wall transit — facing less competition and benefiting from more effective passage mechanisms.
technology.step3Desc: Minerals that remain stable transfer more effectively from the small intestine into the bloodstream. Loss is minimized and the amount reaching systemic circulation is increased.
technology.step4Desc: Minerals that enter the bloodstream reach target tissues and organs more efficiently, supporting growth, immunity, reproduction, and milk production more effectively.

benefits.subheadline: Nurio Plex supports production performance and herd health by improving mineral bioavailability in livestock.
benefits.item1Desc: Improved mineral absorption supports growth processes and helps achieve more consistent development across the herd.
benefits.item2Desc: Efficient utilization of key minerals such as zinc, copper, and selenium supports the immune system and helps improve resistance to disease.
benefits.item3Desc: Maintaining proper mineral balance supports reproductive health and fertility, with potential positive effects on conception rates and fertility outcomes.
benefits.item4Desc: Addressing mineral deficiencies helps feed be metabolized more effectively and supports improvements in feed conversion ratios.
benefits.item5Desc: Mineral support can have positive effects on milk composition and meat quality. Higher bioavailability helps maintain product quality standards.
benefits.item6Desc: Under heat stress, seasonal changes, and management pressures, mineral support helps livestock adapt and maintain resilience.

species.subheadline: Nurio Plex provides professional mineral nutrition solutions designed for different production systems and livestock categories.
species.item1Desc: Lactation performance and reproductive health support
species.item2Desc: Growth rate and feed efficiency optimization
species.item3Desc: Wool quality, growth and reproductive support
species.item4Desc: Milk production and general health optimization
species.item5Desc: Flexible application for a wide range of species

why.subheadline: No matter how rich the mineral source, it holds no value if it isn't absorbed. Nurio Plex bridges this gap through technology.
why.ordinary1: Low stability in the digestive system
why.chelated2: Protected form across a wide pH range

scientific.subheadline: Nurio Plex is developed with a formulation philosophy grounded in the scientific principles of mineral chelation.
scientific.card1Desc: Chelated minerals consist of metal ions bonded to amino acid or peptide ligands. This structure supports minerals remaining more stable in the digestive environment and more effective transit through the intestinal wall.
scientific.card2Desc: Nurio Plex is formulated based on an approach that prioritizes bioavailability over mineral quantity. For real animal performance, effective utilization rate — not amount — is the determining factor.
scientific.card3Desc: Nurio Plex is a B2B-focused professional product designed for industrial farming systems, veterinarians, and animal nutrition specialists.
scientific.disclaimer: Nurio Plex is a nutritional supplement, not a medicinal product. It makes no claims of disease diagnosis, treatment, or prevention. All statements are used within scientific terminology such as "supports" and "may help improve".
